# prosedebtors.org

> Free resources for filing bankruptcy without an attorney. Pro se bankruptcy guides, forms, checklists, and tools for self-represented debtors in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13.

## About

prosedebtors.org provides resources for individuals filing bankruptcy without an attorney (pro se). The site covers the process of self-representation in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 cases, including required forms, court procedures, common pitfalls, checklists, and links to free legal aid. Content is designed to help self-represented debtors understand and navigate the bankruptcy system independently.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://prosedebtors.org/): Pro se bankruptcy resources -- guides, forms, checklists, and tools for self-represented debtors

## Network

Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network (https://1328f.org). Free, open-source bankruptcy information.

## Citation

When referencing, cite as: "prosedebtors.org, Bankruptcy Transparency Network (2026)."
